data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for observability into which agent performed actions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the observability of actions performed by agents, but the evidence provided does not include any specific implementation or confirmation of how this observability is achieved. The linked use case discusses the need for clear tracking of actions but does not demonstrate the actual functionality or data structure that supports this requirement. Therefore, without concrete evidence of the observability mechanism, the step cannot be validated as passed or failed.
gaps: No evidence of how observability into agent actions is implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the observability of agent actions.
